description: Heavily meshed upper for enhanced breathable comfort with suede and leather panels for good shoe structure Velcro closures for forefoot and midfoot straps to offer a customised Fit Cushioned footbed for all-day massaged and cushioned comfort A cut out design on the sides for breathable comfortRubber midsole that provides excellent cushioning and great tractionTPR outsole for enhanced grip and traction adiPrene+ delivers supreme forefoot cushioning Heavy duty lugs which provide grip on any surface
